creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=5e19f4315082b38f1513cd5f577970d280a1596c

commit 5e19f4315082b38f1513cd5f577970d280a1596c
Author:     Mahlon E. Smith <mahlon@martini.nu>
AuthorDate: 2024-08-26 17:33:39 +0000
Commit:     Zsolt Udvari <uzsolt@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-08-26 17:37:51 +0000

    databases/mdbx: Update to 0.12.9

    The source tarball compressed by xz, add tar:xz to USES.
    Use cmake instead of gmake.
    Switch to DISTVERSION.
    The second MASTER_SITES overwrite the first MASTER_SITES (github),
    remove it.

    PR:             277846
    Approved by:    submitter is maintainer

 databases/mdbx/distinfo                       |  6 ++--
 databases/mdbx/files/patch-GNUmakefile (gone) | 42 ---------------------------

 4 files changed, 7 insertions(+), 67 deletions(-)
